LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. AND RASIER LLC, RASIER-CA LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION UNTIL JANUARY 3, 2023, FOR PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO THE INFORMATION RAISED IN DEFENDANTS' REPLY. SPECIFICALLY, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION STATES "PLAINTIFF EXPRESSLY CONSENTED TO THE DECEMBER 2021 TERMS ON MAY 22, 2021 BY CLICKING AN IN-APP BOX (MTN. 14:10-11)" AND DEFENDANT'S REPLY STATES "TO BE CLEAR, THE EVENING OF DECEMBER 31, 2021 WAS NOT THE FIRST TIME PLAINTIFF CONSENTED TO THE TERMS. IN FACT, SHE CONSENTED AT LEAST AS EARLY AS JANUARY 28, 2021, AT 1:09 A.M." (RPLY. 3:4-5.) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2023 Set For Trial On Jan-08-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc., Rasier-Ca, Llc, And Rasier, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Anna Dubrovsky, Esq. (415) 746-1477 ANNA DUBROVSKY LAW GROUP, INC.for Plaintiff.
Tudor Jones, Esq. (707) 559-6750 WOOD, SMITH, HENNING &BERMAN LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-381-5000, raquel@transcriptlegal.com.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Jones raises several points. Ms. Dubrovsky responds.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER LLC, RASIER-CA LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.*** (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Ms. Dubrovsky to submit a proposed order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.
